/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/AudioSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/Bullet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/Powerup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/WaveManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/Effects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sky_circuit.dir/SpriteManager.cpp.o -o sky_circuit  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/raylib/5.5/lib/libraylib.dylib -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/raylib/5.5/lib -lraylib
